case_title: MICHAEL CURTIS FORDHAM VS. CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GORDON C. YOUNG IN SUPPORT OF PETITION OF CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 76227289) FILED BY PETITIONER FORDHAM, MICHAEL CURTIS

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JULY-31-2025 HEARING RE: PETITIONER MICHAEL FORDHAM'S MOTION TO CONFIRM FINRA-DR ARBITRATION AWARD; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. PETITIONER SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT INCORPORATING OR ATTACHING THE AWARD. ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-31-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER MICHAEL FORDHAM's Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed petition to confirm the arbitration award is granted. Petitioner shall submit a proposed judgment incorporating or attaching the award.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
